title: PersonState
description: Event-Carried State Transfer: full current state of a person, written to the compacted topic person.v1.state on every state change. Downstream services use this to bootstrap and maintain a local materialized view.

personId.description: Unique identifier of the person aggregate.

name.description: Last name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true). Absent when deleted=true.

firstName.description: First name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true). Absent when deleted=true.

gender.description: Gender of the person (enum value). Absent when deleted=true.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). May be encrypted when encrypted=true. Absent when deleted=true.

socialSecurityNumber.description: Swiss AHV number in formatted form (756.XXXX.XXXX.XX), or null if not provided.

deleted.description: When true, this is a semantic tombstone indicating the person has been deleted.

encrypted.description: When true, PII fields are Vault-encrypted per ADR-009.

addresses.description: List of all addresses associated with this person. Absent when deleted=true.

street.description: Street name (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

houseNumber.description: House number (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

postalCode.description: Postal code (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

city.description: City name (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

validFrom.description: Start date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

validTo.description: End date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD), or null if open-ended.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.
